changelog: Fixed: Download button not responding — refactored handler to use workout ID lookup instead of closure-captured object, added explicit error toast.
Fixed: Edit routine drag — removed small grip-handle-only activator, entire item now starts the drag.
Fixed: Notification channel migration for existing installs — one-time native call force-deletes and recreates rest_timers channel with system default sound.
Fixed: Drag overlay positioning — compact pill layout with grip icon so the dragged name stays near your finger.
Fixed: Dashboard patch notes — added v2.8.4 entry (now v2.8.5).
Fixed: Exercise card animation glitch — extracted SortableExerciseItem to stable module scope.
Fixed: Back button listener spam — useRef callback pattern in useBackButton.
Fixed: Notification sound delay — removed sound:'default' from createChannel.
